summary: Frontend testing completed for 5-page visit form in Visor Actualización. All new features verified working correctly: Page 4 shows Section 9 (Resumen Áreas de Terreno) with table containing 5 area types (título, base catastral R1, geográfica GDB, levantamiento, identificación) with m², Ha, and Descripción columns. Area base catastral pre-fills from R1 (174 m² verified). Section 10 (Información de Localización) with 'Agregar Fotos del Croquis' button. Page 5 shows Section 11 (Observaciones) with 500 character limit and counter, Section 12 (Firmas) with two signature areas (Visitado and Reconocedor) each with name field and canvas. Navigation buttons 1-2-3-4-5 work correctly. 'Guardar Visita' button only appears on page 5.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Page 4 (Página 4/5) correctly shows Section 9 'RESUMEN ÁREAS DE TERRENO' with table
✓ Section 9 table has columns: 'Área de terreno según:', 'm²', 'Ha', 'Descripción'
✓ Section 9 rows: Área de título, Área base catastral (R1), Área geográfica (GDB), Área levantamiento topográfico, Área de la identificación predial
✓ Área base catastral (R1) pre-fills automatically from R1 data (174 m² verified for test predio)
✓ Área geográfica (GDB) pre-fills automatically from GDB geometry data
✓ Ha column auto-calculates from m² (174 m² = 0.0174 Ha)
✓ Page 4 shows Section 10 'INFORMACIÓN DE LOCALIZACIÓN (Croquis del terreno y construcciones)'
✓ Section 10 has 'Agregar Fotos del Croquis / Localización' button with camera icon
✓ Section 10 shows orientation indicator (N for North)
✓ Page 5 (Página 5/5) correctly shows Section 11 'OBSERVACIONES'
✓ Section 11 has textarea with 500 character limit and counter (0/500)
✓ Section 11 shows 'Máximo 500 caracteres' label
✓ Page 5 shows Section 12 'FIRMAS' with two signature areas
✓ Firma del Visitado (Propietario/Atendiente) has name field and canvas for signature
✓ Firma del Reconocedor Predial has name field and canvas for signature
✓ Both signature areas have 'Limpiar' button to clear canvas
✓ Canvas dimensions are width=500, height=100 as specified
✓ Page 5 shows 'DATOS DE LA VISITA' section with fecha, hora, persona que atiende, relación, acceso, estado, servicios
✓ Navigation buttons 1-2-3-4-5 work correctly for direct page navigation
✓ 'Anterior' and 'Siguiente' buttons work correctly for sequential navigation
✓ 'Guardar Visita' button only appears on page 5 (verified on all 5 pages)
✓ 'Siguiente' button appears on pages 1-4, not on page 5
✓ Page indicator shows correct page number (e.g., 'Página 4/5', 'Página 5/5')
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5-page visit form in Visor Actualización fully tested. Project ID: 32ba040f-ed50-45e2-a115-22ab3a351423. Predio tested: 547200101000000010002000000000 (Área Terreno: 174 m²). All navigation and form sections working correctly. Page 4 has Sections 9-10 (areas and localization). Page 5 has Sections 11-12 (observations and signatures) plus visit data.

feature_1_page4_section9_areas.details: Section 9 'RESUMEN ÁREAS DE TERRENO' shows table with 5 rows: Área de título (editable), Área base catastral R1 (pre-filled 174 m², 0.0174 Ha, read-only), Área geográfica GDB (pre-filled, read-only), Área levantamiento topográfico (editable), Área identificación predial (editable). Each row has m², Ha, Descripción columns.

feature_2_page4_section10_localizacion.details: Section 10 'INFORMACIÓN DE LOCALIZACIÓN (Croquis del terreno y construcciones)' shows description text, grid for uploaded photos, 'Agregar Fotos del Croquis / Localización' button with camera icon, and North orientation indicator.

feature_3_area_base_catastral_prefill.details: Área base catastral (R1) pre-fills automatically from R1 data. Verified with test predio showing 174 m² and auto-calculated 0.0174 Ha. Description shows 'Área del R1 (Excel cargado)'.

feature_4_area_geografica_prefill.details: Área geográfica (GDB) pre-fills automatically from GDB geometry data. Description shows 'Área del GDB (geometría)'.

feature_5_page5_section11_observaciones.details: Section 11 'OBSERVACIONES' shows textarea with placeholder 'Ingrese las observaciones generales de la visita...', 'Máximo 500 caracteres' label, and character counter '0/500' that updates as user types.

feature_6_page5_section12_firmas.details: Section 12 'FIRMAS' shows two signature areas: 'Firma del Visitado (Propietario/Atendiente)' and 'Firma del Reconocedor Predial'. Each has name input field (uppercase) and canvas (width=500, height=100) for hand-drawn signature with 'Limpiar' button.

feature_7_page5_datos_visita.details: 'DATOS DE LA VISITA' section shows: Fecha de Visita (date picker), Hora (time picker), Persona que Atiende (text input), Relación con el Predio (radio: Propietario/Poseedor/Arrendatario/Familiar/Encargado/Otro), ¿Se pudo acceder? (radio: Sí acceso total/Acceso parcial/No se pudo), Estado del Predio (radio: Habitado/Deshabitado/En construcción/Abandonado/Lote vacío/Comercial/Mixto), Servicios Públicos (checkboxes: Agua/Alcantarillado/Energía/Gas/Internet/Teléfono), 'Visitado sin cambios' checkbox.

feature_8_navigation_5_pages.details: Navigation buttons 1-2-3-4-5 (circular buttons) work for direct page navigation. 'Anterior' and 'Siguiente' buttons work for sequential navigation. Page indicator shows 'Página X/5'.

feature_9_guardar_visita_page5_only.details: 'Guardar Visita' button only appears on page 5. Verified on all 5 pages: Pages 1-4 show 'Siguiente' button, Page 5 shows 'Guardar Visita' button. Button is disabled until 'Persona que Atiende' field is filled.
